holdings.infoBox: FLQM is an equity ETF with a total of 205 individual holdings. The top holdings are Monolithic Power Systems stock at 1.75%, Old Dominion Freight Line at 1.58%, NetApp at 1.43%, W.W. Grainger at 1.36%, and Tapestry at 1.36%.

overview.description: The Franklin U.S. Mid Cap Multifactor Index ETF (FLQM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the LibertyQ US Mid Cap Equity index. The fund tracks a US-listed mid-cap equity index that selects and weights constituents based on four factors: quality, value, momentum, and volatility. FLQM was launched on Apr 26, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: LibertyQ US Mid Cap Equity Index
